title: On the Description of Cityscape in Novels Written by Zhang Ailing (Eileen Chang)
author: Qinyan Lv
evidence_summary: Metadata-only note: this article's abstract supports a style profile centered on urban detail, apparel, architecture, and sound as symbolic carriers of emotion, fate, and historical texture. It is especially useful for encoding Zhang Ailing's attention to city life, visual surfaces, and a bright-yet-desolate tonal register.
notes: The DOI and public abstract inform metadata extraction only. No protected article body is copied into repository assets.
